description: Download email templates and send payslip emails with PDF attachments via SMTP

scripts.name: email_download_template
scripts.description: Download the payslip HTML email template from the period folder in Google Drive

args.name: dest
args.description: Local destination path for the downloaded HTML template

scripts.name: email_send
scripts.description: Send payslip emails with PDF attachments to all employees for a given month

args.name: config
args.description: Path to SMTP config file (falls back to SMTP_* env vars if absent)

args.name: output_dir
args.description: Root directory containing per-employee payslip PDFs

args.name: payroll_csv
args.description: Path to payroll CSV used to resolve the employee list
